final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [7:0] sensor_reading,
    output reg [7:0] position
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        position <= 8'b00000000; // Reset position to 0
    end else begin
        position <= position + sensor_reading; // Update position based on sensor reading
    end
end

endmodule
